title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Leaders and Chief Whips of Recognised Parties and Groups in Parliament (Facilities) Act, 1998. 1[ (2) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 5th day of February, 1999.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 18 of2000, s.2, for sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 5-2-1999).
